title: Captain Underpants and the Revolting Revenge of the Radioactive Robo-Boxers
titleZh: 内裤队长与放射性机器人拳击手的复仇
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: Tippy's time tricks unleash Robo-Boxers and rewrite dinosaur history!

q.en: Why doesn't Captain Underpants exist in the changed future?
q.zh: 在改变后的未来里，为什么内裤队长不存在了？

options.en: He was eaten by dinosaurs (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 他被恐龙吃了（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: Mr. Krupp got fired 5 years ago and was never hypnotized
options.zh: 克拉普先生5年前被解雇，再也没人被催眠成他

explain.en: Because Mr. Krupp got fired five years earlier, George and Harold never hypnotized him, so Captain Underpants was never created and the world was destroyed.
explain.zh: 因为克拉普先生提前5年被解雇，乔治和哈罗德再也没催眠过他，内裤队长从未诞生，世界因此毁灭。

q.en: In the prologue, what actually makes the red 'stain' under Zombie Nerd Harold's shoe?
q.zh: 在序章里，僵尸书呆子哈罗德鞋下那摊红色“污迹”到底是什么？

options.en: A squashed tomato (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 一个被压烂的番茄（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）
一包特大号 novelty 番茄酱

explain.en: It was a trick of misdirection: Tippy slid an extra-large novelty ketchup pack under the shoe, so the red stain was just ketchup, not blood.
explain.zh: 这是个“误导”把戏：蒂皮在鞋底下塞了一包特大号番茄酱，所以那摊红迹只是番茄酱，不是血。

q.en: How do George and Harold travel back to the age of the dinosaurs?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德是怎么回到恐龙时代的？

options.en: They drink Super Power Juice (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 他们喝了超能力果汁（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）
他们用蒂皮的机器人裤

options.en: They set the Purple Potty for 65 million years ago and pull the chain
options.zh: 他们把紫色马桶设成6500万年前，然后拉下链条

explain.en: George sets the controller for sixty-five million years ago and pulls the chain — 'Easy, squeezy, mac-n-cheese!' — and the Purple Potty vanishes.
explain.zh: 乔治把控制器设成6500万年前，拉下链条——“小菜一碟，奶酪通心粉！”——紫色马桶就消失了。

q.en: What does Tippy use to shrink his earlier self down to the size of a baseball?
q.zh: 蒂皮用什把更早的自己缩小到了棒球那么大？

explain.en: Future Tippy aimed the Shrinky-Pig 2000 at his younger self and shrank him down to the size of a baseball, then tucked him in his pocket.
explain.zh: 未来的蒂皮用“收缩猪2000”照向年轻的自己，把他缩成棒球大小，塞进了口袋。

q.en: Besides George, Harold, Crackers, and Sulu, who accidentally travels back to the dinosaur age?
q.zh: 除了乔治、哈罗德、脆脆和苏鲁，还有谁意外地被带回了恐龙时代？

explain.en: Mr. Krupp was standing too close to the Purple Potty when they zapped backwards in time, so he got dragged along to the Cretaceous period.
explain.zh: 克拉普先生当时离紫色马桶太近，被一起传送回了白垩纪。

q.en: What device grows Tiny Tippy into the giant 'Supa Mega Tippy'?
q.zh: 是什么装置把小蒂皮变成了巨大的“超级无敌蒂皮”？

explain.en: The two Tiny Tippys grabbed the Goosy-Grow 4000 and zapped each other, growing to thirty then sixty feet tall as 'Supa Mega Tippy.'
explain.zh: 两个小蒂皮抢到了“长大鹅4000”互相对照，先长到30英尺，再长到60英尺，成了“超级无敌蒂皮”。

q.en: According to this book, what really killed the dinosaurs?
q.zh: 按这本书的说法，到底是什么真正灭绝了恐龙？

options.en: A giant volcano (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 一座巨大的火山（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: Tippy's bomb crashing into the Yucatán (the asteroid)
options.zh: 蒂皮的炸弹砸进尤卡坦（那颗小行星）

explain.en: Big Tippy's bomb landed off the coast of the Yucatán Peninsula and 'triggered the start of the Cenozoic era' — i.e. the dinosaur extinction.
explain.zh: 大蒂皮的炸弹砸在尤卡坦半岛外海，“触发了新生代的开始”——也就是恐龙大灭绝。

q.en: In the Pleistocene, what does Sulu do to help the friends escape Supa Mega Tippy's grip?
q.zh: 在更新世，苏鲁做了什么帮大家逃出超级无敌蒂皮的抓手？

options.en: Zaps him with a beam (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 用射线照他（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Sulu bit through three of the Extendo-Flex Mechani-Grippers, and the four friends fluttered away to freedom.
explain.zh: 苏鲁咬断了三根“伸缩机械抓手”，四个朋友趁机扇着翅膀逃走了。

q.en: When George and Harold arrive '65 million years ago,' what era are they in?
q.zh: 当乔治和哈罗德“回到6500万年前”，他们身处哪个地质时代？

options.en: The Stone Age (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 石器时代（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Tiny Tippy reports they are 'going back in time to the Mesozoic era' — the age of the dinosaurs.
explain.zh: 小蒂皮报告说他们“正回到中生代”——也就是恐龙称霸的时代。

q.en: In the Pleistocene epoch, what prehistoric people do the heroes meet?
q.zh: 在更新世，英雄们遇到了哪群史前人类？

options.zh: 穴居人（最早的人类家族）

options.en: Talking toilets (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 会说话的马桶（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Supa Mega Tippy explains they are in the Pleistocene, 'around the time that the first human family started to appear on Earth' — surprised cavemen.
explain.zh: 超级无敌蒂皮说他们身处更新世，“大约是最早的人类家族出现在地球上的时候”——一群吓坏了的穴居人。
